Deprecated API

Contents

  • Deprecated Interfaces
  • Deprecated Classes
  • Deprecated Enums
  • Deprecated Fields
  • Deprecated Methods
  • Deprecated Interfaces 
    Interface and Description
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.analogserial.AnalogSerialManager
    This module can use USBSerialPort instead, which created by SerialPortManager.createInstance(SerialPortType, SerialPortSettings).
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M0Card
    Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M1Card
    Replaced by "MifareClassicCard" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3.UART3Port
    This module can be only supported on the following devices.
    • CPOS X5 A7/A10
    • N910 A7
    • N700 A7
    • N850 A7
    • U2000
    The other devices please refer to SerialPort, which created by SerialPortManager.createInstance(com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.serialportmanager.SerialPortType, SerialPortSettings).
  • Deprecated Classes 
    Class and Description
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3.UART3Config
    This class is instead by SerialPortSettings.
  • Deprecated Enums 
    Enum and Description
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3.UART3Type
    This is instead by SerialPortType.
  • Deprecated Fields 
    Field and Description
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConfig._EMVPARAM_DF38_VISATTQ 
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings.PRINTER_GREY_LEVEL
    Replaced by Printer.setGray(int).
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings.SETTING_PRODUCT_MODEL
    Replaced by DeviceManager.getDeviceInfo().
  • Deprecated Methods 
    Method and Description
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M0Card.authenticate(byte[])
    Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard.authenticate()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M1Card.authenticate(ContactlessKeyMode, byte[], byte, byte[])
    Replaced by "MifareClassicCard.authenticate()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M1Card.decrement(byte, byte[])
    Replaced by "MifareClassicCard.decrement()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.NSDKModuleManager.enableNativeLog(boolean)
    Replaced by NSDKModuleManager.setNativeDebugMode(NativeDebugLevel).
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.devicemanager.DeviceManager.getTamperStatus()
    This method can be replaced by DeviceManager.getTamperStatuses().
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.keymanager.KeyManager.increaseKSN(byte)
    Replaced by KeyManager.increaseKSN(SymmetricKey).
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M1Card.increment(byte, byte[])
    Replaced by "MifareClassicCard.increment()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.serialportmanager.SerialPort.ioctl(int, byte[])
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.cardreader.CardReader.isCardInserted()
    This interface can be replaced by CardReader.checkCardSlotStatus(ContactCardSlot).
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.analogserial.AnalogSerialManager.isMacMode() 
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.devicemanager.ExtDeviceManager.loadFirmwareOrAppFile(String, byte[], UpdateListener)
    Replaced by ExtDeviceManager.update(UpdateFiles, UpdateListener).
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.card.contact.ExtCPUContactCard.performAPDU(Key, AlgorithmParameters, byte[]) 
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.card.contactless.ExtCPUContactlessCard.performAPDU(Key, AlgorithmParameters, byte[]) 
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M0Card.readBlockData(byte)
    Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard.read()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M1Card.readBlockData(byte)
    Replaced by "MifareClassicCard.readBlockData()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M1Card.restore(byte)
    Replaced by "MifareClassicCard.restore()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.communication.ExternalCommunicator.setCommunicationTimeout(int, int)
    This method has been moved to ExtNSDKModuleManager.setCommunicationTimeout(int, int)
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.analogserial.AnalogSerialManager.setMacMode(boolean) 
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M1Card.transfer(byte)
    Replaced by "MifareClassicCard.transfer()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
    com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.devicemanager.ExtDeviceManager.updateFirmwareOrApp(String, boolean)
    Replaced by ExtDeviceManager.update(UpdateFiles, UpdateListener).
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M0Card.writeBlockData(byte, byte[])
    Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard.write()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
    com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M1Card.writeBlockData(byte, byte[])
    Replaced by "MifareClassicCard.writeBlockData()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
